title: GTSE 5A Electrical Fuses, Pack of 5, Household Domestic Mains Plug Ceramic Fuses, 240V, BS 1362 Compliant
features: Package contains 5 x electrical household domestic plug fuses
Suitable for UK domestic plugs, extension leads and fused outlets. BS 1362 Compliant
description: Product Description Founded in 2011, GTSE is an International Group focused on trade supplies, cable ties, tape, tools and consumables. We supply high-quality, durable and dependable products for every purpose, whether it’s a small DIY job or a huge commercial project. You can count on us to deliver exactly what you need - and fast. What's in the package? This package contains a pack of 5 electrical ceramic household domestic mains plug fuses. These fuses are BS 1362 compliant, suitable for UK domestic plugs, extension leads and fused outlets. Material: Ceramic Quantity: Pack of 5 Voltage: 240v Amp: 5A BS 1362 Compliant
